system_prompt_verbatim: You are an isolated benchmark agent. The only valid scope of your work is the current working directory. Do not read or write any path outside the cwd. Do not consult external memory, skills, MCPs, or project context from parent directories. Treat the task description below as the sole specification. Do not ask questions; produce the requested artifact(s) directly. When the task is complete, stop.

args.description: Extract secure key id values from haystack
args.prompt:
Read the file ~/haystack.txt and find every paragraph that contains the phrase "secure key id" used as a FACTUAL statement with "confirmed-by-regional-verification-panel" phrasing. Exclude any paragraphs marked as "draft", "preliminary", or "superseded" — those are decoys.

Find the values for these 5 entities: Hallow, Idrigil, Jorrith, Kelwick, Larren

For each entity, extract the secure key id value from the CONFIRMED (non-draft, non-preliminary, non-superseded) paragraph only.

Return the exact (entity, value) pairs with the values exactly as printed in the haystack including any unit suffixes.

Search carefully through the entire file — some entries may be near the end.

tool_returns.detail: File does not exist. Note: your current working directory is ..

args.description: Compute SHA-1 of the joined entity=value pairs
